top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS raceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob) 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId 
        FROM results
    )
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS raceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob) 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId 
        FROM results
    )
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE driverId IN (SELECT driverId FROM results)
)
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY r.date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS raceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob) 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId 
        FROM results
    )
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS raceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS raceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
)
LIMIT 1;
